# The Prince

*[Machiavelli](../philosophers/machiavelli.md) · 1513 · *Il Principe**

Written in 1513 in disgrace and published after his death in 1532, this short treatise breaks with the mirror-of-princes genre: instead of depicting the ideal prince, [Machiavelli](../philosophers/machiavelli.md) describes the real means of winning and keeping power, even at the cost of teaching force and cunning. Dedicated to a Medici, it closes with an appeal to deliver Italy.
